title: diplazium urbani
intro: Diplazium urbani is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Diplazium urbani include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
